goal: As BO-League Champions grows, native Teamfight Manager 2 heroes must either be replaced by a complete League identity or retired from public roster/encyclopedia surfaces through a verified runtime path.
current_stage: Gate native visibility before claiming a complete League roster; do not hide base heroes until the mod has a proven safe data/runtime path.

native_retirement_queue.reason: Base-game heroes are still visible beside additive League champions; retire them only after a safe hide/disable path is proven from game data or runtime logs.
